_meta.purpose: Day-5 milestone pretrain corpus (public-domain English, simple/children's-leaning).
_meta.note: data/raw and data/clean are gitignored (bytes not tracked); this manifest is the tracked, reproducible record. chars-per-token reported after the tokenizer (Day 5d).
